calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR. Pat Evezich.
Appearances:
Raquel Fox, Esq. for Plaintiff Gabriella Ramirez, the guardian ad litem, also present.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the disputed claim of 3 minors as follows:
Minors Gabriela Ramirez, Xiomara Ramirez and Cinthia Ramirez receive $200.00 each for a total of $600.00 to be given directly to Petitioner to hold in trust.
Counsel to prepare order.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)
